title: Chain Step Result
description: Result of a single step in the Vigilia chain execution.

step_id.description: Sequential step number in the chain.

loop_id.description: ID of the loop that executed this step.

actions_allowed.description: Number of actions approved by the Dispatcher.

actions_denied.description: Number of actions denied by the Dispatcher.

output_files.description: Paths to files produced by this step.

events_emitted.description: Total events written to the chain event log delta.

message.description: Human-readable summary of the step outcome.
